PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE SERVED MAY-15-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MACHULE, DARREN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS CARINA KAHANE AND DYANNA BOHORQUES ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT DARREN MACHULE IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY KAHANE, CARINA BOHORQUES, DYANNA MACHULE, DARREN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAHANE, CARINA BOHORQUES, DYANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACHULE, DARREN $1,211.18 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,286.18 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
